heading: General authority
label: 2872 General authority
notes: Amendments2025—Par. (1). substituted inserted “, including such units for civilian employees of the Department of Defense and defense contractors” before period at end.Pub. L. 119–601999— substituted “eligible entities” for “private persons” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 106–65
amendments: Amendments2025—Par. (1). substituted inserted “, including such units for civilian employees of the Department of Defense and defense contractors” before period at end.Pub. L. 119–601999— substituted “eligible entities” for “private persons” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 106–65

children.text: Family housing units on or near military installations within the United States and its territories and possessions, including such units for civilian employees of the Department of Defense and defense contractors.
Military unaccompanied housing units on or near such military installations.
